description: 20 unique office IT scenarios — fresh set (not pallavi_30 or custom_25)

cases.title: Authenticator App Codes Not Accepted
cases.description: Microsoft Authenticator codes rejected when signing into O365. Phone time is correct but MFA verification fails on every attempt.

cases.title: Ransomware Note on Shared Drive
cases.description: Security incident: users on finance share see .encrypted extension and ransom note README.txt. Multiple files inaccessible on \\fileserver\finance.

cases.title: BGP Session Flapping Between Sites
cases.description: BGP peering between HQ and DR datacenter flapping every 2 minutes. WAN monitoring shows route withdraw/readvertise loop on edge routers.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Replication Lag Critical
cases.description: PostgreSQL streaming replica on reporting cluster is 45 minutes behind primary. Dashboard queries returning stale sales numbers.

cases.title: MacBook Battery Swelling
cases.description: MacBook Pro trackpad lifted and case bulging — battery swelling suspected. Device powered off for safety, need hardware replacement.

cases.title: Salesforce SSO SAML Assertion Failed
cases.description: Salesforce login fails with SAML assertion invalid after IdP certificate rotation. Entire sales team blocked from CRM.

cases.title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff
cases.description: Production checkout service pods in CrashLoopBackOff on EKS cluster. Deployment rolled out 30 minutes ago, customers see 503 errors.

cases.title: FortiGate License Expired
cases.description: FortiGate perimeter firewall reports license expired. IPS and web filtering disabled — security policy degraded company-wide.

cases.title: GitLab Runner Disk Full
cases.description: GitLab CI pipelines failing — runner VM /var partition 100% full. No builds completing for mobile app release branch.

cases.title: Okta Group Missing for New Project
cases.description: Added to new engineering project in HR system but Okta group PROJECT-PHOENIX not assigned. Cannot access Jira, GitHub, or Confluence for the project.

cases.title: NetApp Snapshot Restore Request
cases.description: Accidentally deleted quarterly report folder on NetApp NAS. Need storage team to restore from last night snapshot on vol_finance.

cases.title: Laptop Fan Running at Full Speed
cases.description: Dell Latitude fan constantly at maximum RPM and chassis hot to touch. CPU usage normal in Task Manager — possible thermal paste or fan failure.

cases.title: Zoom Screen Share Shows Black Screen
cases.description: When sharing screen in Zoom meetings attendees see black screen. Camera and mic work fine. Issue started after macOS Sonoma update.

cases.title: Privileged DB Access for Incident
cases.description: Need temporary read-only production database access for P1 incident investigation. Manager approved — require break-glass privileged access for 4 hours.

cases.title: Employee Downloading Customer PII Bulk Export
cases.description: Security incident: DLP flagged employee downloading 50,000 customer records to personal USB drive. HR and legal notified — immediate investigation required.

cases.title: DHCP Scope Exhausted Floor 12
cases.description: New hires on floor 12 cannot get IP addresses. DHCP scope 10.12.0.0/24 shows 0 available leases. Wired and wireless affected.

cases.title: MySQL Table Corruption on Orders DB
cases.description: MySQL InnoDB corruption error on orders database table during nightly ETL. Order processing halted — error 145 Table is marked as crashed.

cases.title: Second Monitor Not Detected HDMI
cases.description: Plugged second monitor via HDMI into docking station but Windows shows only one display. Monitor power light on, tried different cable.

cases.title: Confluence Space Permission Denied
cases.description: Cannot edit pages in Confluence space ENG-WIKI after team reorg. View access works but all edit actions return permission denied.

cases.title: Internal API TLS Certificate Expired
cases.description: Security incident: internal payment API TLS certificate expired yesterday. Microservices failing mutual TLS handshake — customer checkout impacted.
